metadata.title: SceneFlow AI - Ukwenziwa kwamavidiyo kusetshenziswa i-AI
metadata.description: Guqula imibono yakho ibe amavidiyo asezingeni eliphezulu usebenzisa uhlelo oluzenzakalelayo lokusebenza olusekelwe kubuchwepheshe be-AI.

hero.headline: Yeka ukuzama ukuphatha amathebhu amahlanu e-AI ngesikhathi esisodwa. Isitudiyo esisodwa sikusiza ukuthi usuke emcabangweni uze ube nevidiyo esilungele ukushicilelwa.
hero.subheadline: Isikhungo esisodwa esikuqondisayo kusukela emcabangweni kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osekulungele ukushicilelwa. Bona uhlaka lwevidiyo yakho (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokuba ukhokhele ividiyo yokugcina — vumela ukubukeka kwayo kunokuchitha amakhredithi ekuzameni nokuqagela. I-SceneFlow yenza imisebenzi ephindaphindekayo ngokuzenzakalelayo — njengombhalo, uhlaka lwevidiyo, izwi, kanye nokuhlanganisa izingxenye — ngenkathi wena ulawula yonke ingxenye yenqubo.
hero.audienceMicroLine: Yakhelwe abadali abafuna imiphumela, kanye namaqembu afuna ukubona ukuthi isebenza kanjani.
hero.ctaToolStack: Bona indlela okuthatha ngayo indawo yeqoqo lakho lamathuluzi.
hero.languagePrompt: Izwa iqhawe ngolimi lwakho — inqubo efanayo, izimakethe ezintsha
hero.multilangHint: I-Hero yenza ukufakwa kwamazwi ngezilimi eziyi-7 — uhlelo oluphelele lusekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 esigabeni sokukhiqiza.

beatFirstPipeline.title: Inqubo Yokukhiqiza Ividiyo Eqala Ngesigqi
beatFirstPipeline.subtitle: Vumela ngaphambi kokukhiqiza umphumela — hhayi ukuvuselela okufana nomshini wokugembula.
beatFirstPipeline.intro: Akukho ukukhiqiza ngokulinganisa nokuhlola. Uyabuka kuqala bese uvumela ukubukeka kwayo ngaphambi kokuba i-SceneFlow isebenzise amakhredithi kwividiyo yokugcina.
beatFirstPipeline.description: I-SceneFlow ihlela inqubo yokugunyazwa kokubonakalayo esigabeni ngasinye: i-Express Pre-vis yokubuyekeza, i-Beat Frames yokukhiya ukwakheka, bese kuba yi-F2V esigqi ngasinye. Uyawulungisa umbonakalo ngaphambi kokuchitha amakhredithi ezintweni ezingahleliwe noma amaphutha okukhiqiza (hallucinations).
steps: Express Pre-vis — yabelana ngemigqoqo yomculo enezithombe ukuze ibuyekezwe ngemizuzu embalwa
Beat Frames — vala ukwakheka kokuqala/kokuphela ngokuhambisana nokuqhubeka kwe-Reference Library
I-F2V ngesigqi — khiqiza ividiyo usebenzisa ozimele (frames) abagunyaziwe, hhayi imiyalelo engacacile.
Production Mixer — ukuhlelwa kwesikhathi, umsindo, nokuthunyelwa kokusakazwayo ukuze kuhlanganiswe ku-Final Cut
beatFirstPipeline.footerLine: Ukunciphisa ukuphinda kwenziwe imifanekiso yemishini yokugembula — vumela imifanekiso ngaphambi kokusebenzisa imali yokugcina kuvidiyo.

toolStack.title: Indlela Engalungile uma iqhathaniswa nendlela ye-SceneFlow
toolStack.subtitle: Kubakhiqizi abanolwazi: yekani ukuchitha amahora amaningi nikopisha futhi ninamathisela phakathi kwemibhalo, izithombe, umsindo, amavidiyo, umculo namathuluzi okuhlela. Uma usanda kuqala ukusebenzisa amavidiyo e-AI: kukhona isitudiyo esisodwa esikuqondisayo futhi esenza yonke le nqubo ngokuzenzakalelayo, ukuze ukwazi ukuqeda umsebenzi wakho ngaphandle kokufunda izinhlelo zokusebenza eziyisithupha ezihlukene.

brokenWay.title: Indlela Ephukile
brokenWay.tagline: Kuhlukaniswe izingxenye. Kwenziwa ngesandla. Ividiyo yomshini wokugembula.

brokenWay.chaosLabel: Amathebhu ayisithupha. Zama futhi kuze kube yilapho kukhona okuphumelelayo.

Ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo ngendlela yomshini wokugembula — zama kaningi kuze kube yilapho kutholakala okusebenzekayo.
Ukukhathala ngenxa yemiyalelo kanye nemijikelezo yokukhiqiza kabusha
Akukho kuhlolwa kwezethameli ngaphambi kokuba uchithe imali.

sceneflowWay.title: Indlela ye-SceneFlow
sceneflowWay.tagline: Isitudiyo esisodwa. Ukuzenzakalela okuqondiswayo — noma ukusebenza ngejubane elikhulu uma usuwazi kakade uhlelo lobuchwepheshe obusetshenziswayo.
sceneflowWay.syncLabel: Ifayela lephrojekthi elilodwa — akukho ukushintshashintsha phakathi kwamathebhu
benefits: Izigaba eziqondiswayo — yeka ukushintshashintsha phakathi kwamathebhu nokulahlekelwa umongo
Ukugunyazwa kohlaka lwevidiyo — misa ukuphinda kwenziwe kabusha kwesigaba sevidiyo ngaphambi kokuba kuchithwe imali kuyo.
Isikolo se-Audience Resonance ngaphambi kokwenziwa kwesithombe okunzima
Inguqulo yokugcina elungele ukushicilelwa ngemizuzu engu-30–60, hhayi amahora angaphezu kwama-4

toolStack.comparisonCaption: Isitudiyo esisodwa sithatha indawo yamathuluzi okukhiqiza ahlukene, ukuphinda kwenziwe amavidiyo ngendlela engahleliwe (njengomshini wokugembula), kanye nokuhlanganisa ukuhlela okwenziwa ngesandla.
toolStack.comparisonImageAlt: Izindleko zokukhiqiza ngendlela evamile uma kuqhathaniswa nesitudiyo esisebenza ngokuzenzakalela — kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo elungele ukushicilelwa ngokushesha okukhulu
toolStack.costNote: Izindleko ze-AI zihlala zifana, kodwa isikhathi esichithwa ngize siyancipha. Ukhokhela amamodeli noma ngabe iyiphi indlela oyikhethayo — kungaba ngamakhredithi e-SceneFlow, i-akhawunti yakho yomhlinzeki, noma i-BYOK. I-SceneFlow iqeda izindleko ezengeziwe ezihambisana nenqubo yokukopisha nokunamathisela, okukuvumela ukuthi ukhiqize futhi ukhiphe amavidiyo amaningi ngesabelomali esifanayo.
toolStack.proofLine: Kuqinisekiswe ohambweni lokuhlola indlu efakwe ohlwini: inqubo ephelele eyenziwa ngesandla ithatha amahora angaphezu kwama-4 → umphumela ofanayo usebenzisa i-SceneFlow uthatha isikhathi esingaphansi kwehora.

comparison.title: Isivinini sokukhiqiza ngaphandle kwezindleko ezengeziwe
comparison.subtitle: Thatha indawo yamathuluzi okukhiqiza okuqukethwe ahlukene kanye nokuhlanganisa ngesandla ngokusebenzisa isitudiyo esisodwa esisebenza ngokuzenzakalelayo — kusukela emcabangweni wokuqala kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osethulungele ukushicilelwa.
comparison.caption: Isikhungo esisodwa sithatha indawo yamathuluzi okufaka imiyalelo (prompts) ahlukene, ukuhlela ngesandla, kanye nokudluliselwa komsebenzi phakathi kwezinkundla eziningi.
comparison.imageAlt: Izindleko zokukhiqiza ngendlela evamile uma kuqhathaniswa nesitudiyo esisebenza ngokuzenzakalela — kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo elungele ukushicilelwa ngokushesha okukhulu

howItWorks.title: Kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo esilungele ukushicilelwa
howItWorks.subtitle: Uchungechunge luyakhetheka. Indlela eyinhloko ithi Blueprint → Ukukhiqiza → Final Cut → Premiere — okuhlanganisa izigaba ze-pre-vis, i-animatic, ividiyo, kanye ne-master MP4 phakathi naleso sikhathi.
howItWorks.tagline: Isinyathelo ngasinye senziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngobuchwepheshe obuphezulu. Isinyathelo ngasinye sikunikeza amandla aphelele okulawula.

phases.subtitle: Injini ye-Showrunner
phases.description: Chaza umhlaba wakho kanye bese udala izindaba ezihambisanayo ezihlanganisa iziqephu eziningi. Ukusebenzisa i-Reference Library ngokuhlanganyela kuqinisekisa ukuthi abalingiswa nesimo sendaba kuhlala kuhambisana kuso sonke isizini.
keySteps: Chaza umhlaba wendaba — abalingiswa, isimo sendaba, kanye nohlelo olukhulu lwesizini.
Khiqiza ngokuzenzakalelayo uhlaka lweziqephu zayo yonke isizini
Hlanganisa ne-Blueprint kanye nokukhiqizwa kwesiqephu ngasinye
keyFeatures: Chaza umhlaba wakho kanye kuphela — abalingiswa, isimo, kanye nohlelo lwendaba lwesizini.
Izinhlaka zeziqephu ezihleleke kahle — ezikhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuso sonke isizini
Ukulandelela ukuqhubeka — ukuqinisekisa ukuthi iziqephu zezinkathi eziningi ziyahambisana
Ukuvumelanisa uchungechunge neziqephu — ku-Studio kanye nasekukhiqizeni kwe-Blueprint

phases.subtitle: Ukuthuthukiswa Kwendaba
phases.description: Guqula imiqondo ibe yizinhlaka ezihleliwe ezihlanganisa isifinyezo sendaba (logline), izigaba ezibalulekile (beats), abalingiswa, kanye nesimo sendaba (tone). Sebenzisa i-Audience Resonance futhi usebenzisane nabanye ngaphambi kokuqala inqubo enzima yokukhiqiza isithombe sokugcina (rendering).
keySteps: Audience Resonance ukuthola amaphuzu ngomgomo ongu-80+
Izixhumanisi zokwabelana zomhlanganyeli kanye nokukhipha amafayela (PDF, Doc, PPTX)
keyFeatures: Ukukhiqiza → Ukubuyekeza → Ukwenza ngcono okuqhubekayo → Ukuqala inqubo yokukhiqiza
Ukusuka emcabangweni kuya esakhiweni ngemizuzu — isifinyezo sendaba, izigaba ezibalulekile, abalingiswa, kanye nomoya wendaba
Audience Resonance ukuthola amaphuzu okuhloswe ngawo angaphezu kuka-80 ngaphambi kwesigaba sokukhiqiza
Izixhumanisi zokwabelana zabahlanganyeli — ukuhlanganiswa kwemibono ukuze kwenziwe ukulungisa okuqondisiwe

phases.subtitle: Kusukela kumbhalo kuya ekusakazweni
phases.description: Amathebhu e-Script ne-Action aqondisa inqubo kusukela ku-Foundation → pre-vis → Production → Final Cut. Kuhlanganisa i-Express Pre-vis, i-Beat Frames, i-Mixer, kanye nemifudlana ye-MP4 — ngaphandle kokushintsha amathuluzi.
keySteps: Qinisekisa umbhalo, amazwi, kanye nomsindo wesigcawu
Express Pre-vis — igalari nokwabelana ukuze kubuyekezwe
Beat Frames → Ikhonsoli Yomqondisi → Ukusakaza Okukhiqiziwe
keyFeatures: Foundation — umbhalo, amazwi, umsindo wesigcawu, ukuvala umbhalo
Express Pre-vis — isiqondiso namafreyimu ngemizuzu; igalari nokwabelana
Beat Frames ne-Mixer — amafreyimu okuqala/okugcina, i-Director Console, ukukhiqiza ama-stream e-MP4
Imigudu Yokukhiqiza — hlola imiphumela, phinda ukhiqize imiculo (beats) engasasebenzi, thumela ku-Final Cut

phases.subtitle: Ukuhlanganiswa Kokugeleza
phases.description: Hlanganisa imifudlana yokukhiqiza eseqediwe ibe yifayela elilodwa elikhulu le-MP4. Khetha i-Animatic noma ividiyo nolimi ngesigcawu ngasinye — akukho ukuhlela kulayini wesikhathi; izinguquko zobuciko zihlala ku-Production Mixer.
keySteps: Khetha imifudlana ngesigcawu ngasinye — kungaba ukuhlanganisa okusethiwe noma okwenziwe ngokwezifiso
Buka kuqala uhlelo oluphelele ngokulandelana kombhalo
Khipha ifayela elilodwa eliyinhloko le-MP4 le-Premiere
keyFeatures: Ukukhethwa kokusakaza ngokusho kwesigcawu — Animatic, Ividiyo, ulimi, inguqulo
Izinhlelo ezimisiwe zokuhlanganisa — Ividiyo Yonke, Okuxubile, Ukuxuba okwenziwe ngokwezifiso
Akukho ukuhlela komugqa wesikhathi — izinguquko zobuciko zihlala ku-Production Mixer
Ukukhipha ifayela eliyinhloko ngokuchofoza kanye — i-MP4 ehlanganisiwe ye-Premiere

phases.subtitle: Isikhungo Sokusabalalisa
phases.description: Hlola ividiyo yakho eyinhloko kanye nemininingwane yokuhlaziya izethameli, bese uyishicilela ku-YouTube usebenzisa imininingwane ehambisana nendawo, noma ukhiphe amafayela afanele ama-Shorts, ama-Reels kanye ne-TikTok.
keySteps: Dala uhlelo lokuhlola bese wabelana ngesixhumanisi
Ukuhlola amaphuzu, ukusebenzisana, kanye nemininingwane ebonakalayo
I-wizard ye-YouTube noma iphakethe lokuthumela ngaphandle
keyFeatures: Okungabelwana ngakho Screening Room — Izixhumanisi ze-/s/ ezinezinhlelo zokubala amaphuzu kanye nokuhlaziywa kokusebenzisana okungakhethwa (ngemvume yombukeli)
Ideshibhodi Yemininingwane — Amathebhu Okushaya Amaphuzu, Ezici Zomzimba (Biometric), kanye Nokubonakalayo
Uchwepheshe we-YouTube — isithombe esincane (thumbnail), isihloko/incazelo ehambisana nendawo, SceneFlow isicelo sokuthatha isinyathelo (CTA)
Thumela amaqoqo nezinhlelo zama-clip amafushane aqondile

useCases.title: Noma yiluphi uhlobo lwevidiyo ongayicabanga,
useCases.subtitle: Imibukiso yezindlu nezakhiwo, ezemfundo, ama-podcast, izinhlelo zezindaba, imikhankaso yemikhiqizo, kanye nezindaba ezixoxwa ngendlela yamafilimu — konke lokhu kwenziwa esitudiyo esisodwa esisebenza ngokuzenzakalelayo, kusukela emcabangweni wokuqala kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osethulungele ukushicilelwa.
useCases.qualifyingStatement: I-SceneFlow iguqula izithombe zakho zokuqala, amafayela olayishiwe, kanye nezincazelo zibe amavidiyo achazayo abonisa indawo noma inqubo — okuhlanganisa inketho yezwi kanye nokuba khona kwabalingiswa okulawulwa nguwe. Lezi yizethulo ezilungiswe ubuchwepheshe be-AI: izithombe ezibonakala zingokoqobo futhi ezisekelwe ezintweni onazo, hhayi amavidiyo aqoshwe ngqo ngekhamera. Hlola futhi uvumele uhlaka lwevidiyo (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokuyishicilela; bhala amagama acacile emikhiqizweni ukuze izethameli zazi ukuthi zibukani.

ui.selectExample: Khetha isibonelo ukuze ubuke kuqala idemo yaso
ui.frameAnchoredDescription: I-SceneFlow iwukuphela kwethuluzi elenza kube nokwenzeka ukugcina ukuhambisana okusekelwe kuzinhlaka (frame-anchored continuity), okuqinisekisa ukuthi umkhiqizo noma umlingiswa weklayenti lakho uhlala unjalo kuzo zonke izingxenye zesigcawu.

challenge.title: Isithiyo Esihlobene Nama-B-Roll
challenge.description: Unombhalo omuhle kakhulu, kodwa ukufunda amathuluzi ayisithupha ahlukene okudala nokuhlela — noma ukubambeka ekwenzeni amavidiyo aphindaphindeka ngendlela engapheli — kubambezela inqubo yokulayisha ividiyo ngayinye. Lokhu kubambezela kuphazamisa ukulandelana kokushicilela kanye nekhono lokugcina izethameli ziqhubeka nokubukela.

solution.title: Umxoxi Wezindaba Ozisebenzelayo
solution.description: Inqubo ezenzakalelayo eqondiswayo kusukela kumbhalo kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osekulungele ukushicilelwa — akukho sidingo sokufunda izinhlelo zokusebenza eziyisithupha ezihlukene. Gcina ukuhambisana kwabalingiswa nesitayela kusukela esigcawini sokuqala kuze kube sekupheleni kokukhiqizwa kochungechunge.
features: Abalingiswa abaphambili abangaguquki kuzo zonke izigcawu
Khulisa umsebenzi ube uchungechunge lweziqephu usebenzisa umtapo wolwazi owabiwayo

creator.win: Shintsha usuke ekulayisheni okuvela ngezikhathi ezithile uye ohlelweni lokukhiqiza oluthembekile, oludinga umzamo noma izindlela ezingeziwe ezincane.

team.label: Ithimba langaphakathi
team.title: Ithimba Lamavidiyo Langaphakathi

challenge.title: Ukunqwabelana Kwemisebenzi Yomhlinzeki kanye Nokuchezuka Kwesithunzi Somkhiqizo
challenge.description: Amaqembu ezokuxhumana, ezokuqeqesha nokuthuthukiswa kwabasebenzi (L&D), kanye nawokumaketha achitha amasonto elinde amavidiyo avela ezinkampanini zangaphandle — noma abhekane nenqwaba yamathuluzi adidayo ngaphandle kohlelo oluzinzile olungasetshenziswa ngaphakathi enkampanini. Yonke le migwaqo iholela ekungabini bikho kokufana kwendlela yokwethula umkhiqizo (branding) kanye nokuma kwemikhankaso.

solution.title: Ukukhiqiza Ngaphakathi Enkampanini Phakathi Neviki Elilodwa
solution.description: Yabela abasebenzi umsebenzi wokukhiqiza amavidiyo ngaphakathi kwesabelomali esibikezelekayo samakhredithi — kusetshenziswa izifanekiso zomkhiqizo, kutholakala imvume ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kwenguqulo yokugcina, futhi kungabikho zindleko zezinsuku zabasebenzi noma izigaba zokuhlela ezingenamkhawulo wesikhathi.
features: Faka esikhundleni sokusebenzisa abahlinzeki bangaphandle ukuthatha izithombe noma amavidiyo, izinqubo zangaphakathi eziqondiswayo.
Izifanekiso nemitapo yolwazi ehambisana nemigomo yomkhiqizo
Ukubonakala kokusetshenziswa kwekhredithi kanye nemikhawulo yesabelomali ngephrojekthi ngayinye
Vumela ama-pre-vis ngaphambi kokukhokhela ividiyo yokugcina.

team.win: Khipha izinto zokuqeqesha, ezokuxhumana namavidiyo emikhankaso ngokohlelo lwakho — hhayi ngokulinda uhlu lwemisebenzi engakaqedwa yomphakeli.

productionShop.label: Indawo Yokukhiqiza
productionShop.title: Isitolo Sokukhiqiza Okukhethekile

challenge.title: Izixazululo Eziklanyelwe Imikhakha Ethile, Akukho Sis-temu Esiphindekayo
challenge.description: Amakhasimende ezinhlelo zezinkumbulo, ukulondoloza umlando, ezindlu nomhlaba, kanye nezemfundo adinga imiphumela esheshayo — kodwa iphrojekthi ngayinye iqala phansi sha. Ukudluliselwa komsebenzi esigabeni ngasinye kanye nokubuyekezwa okuphindaphindwayo — okufana nokudlala imishini yokugembula — ezicini ezifana nombhalo, izithombe, izwi, ividiyo, umculo namathuluzi okuhlela, kunciphisa kakhulu inzuzo lapho kusebenza ngemisebenzi eminingi.

solution.title: Guqula Insizakalo Yakho Yamavidiyo Ibe Umkhiqizo
solution.description: Yakha izinqubo zomsebenzi eziphindaphindekayo zezitudiyo ezibhala izindaba zempilo (memoir studios) kanye nemikhakha ekhethekile yebhizinisi. Lokhu kubandakanya ukulayishwa kwama-template, ukwenziwa kwamakhophi amazwi, ama-avatar, kanye nokugunyazwa kwezinhlelo ezibonakalayo (pre-vis) — yenza izinguquko ngokwezidingo zekhasimende ngalinye futhi wandise inzuzo ngokwandisa ivolumu yomsebenzi.
features: Izifanekiso zezindaba zempilo ezinezinketho zokulayisha izithombe, ukulingisa amazwi, kanye nabalingiswa bedijithali abethula okuqukethwe
Ukwamukelwa kwamakhasimende kuhlotshaniswa ne-Blueprint kanye nezigaba zokugunyazwa kwe-pre-vis
Amaphakethe esitudiyo angenalo uphawu lomkhiqizi (white-label) ezinhlelweni zevidiyo ezigcina umlando, ezihlonipha abantu, kanye nezisekelwe ekubhaliseni.
Inzuzo kuma-credit esikhundleni sezindleko ezengeziwe zokuqopha ngakunye

productionShop.win: Qala ibhizinisi lokwenza amavidiyo alondoloza izinkumbulo noma insizakalo ekhethekile yesitudiyo ehlinzekwa ngendlela ephindaphindekayo — hhayi umsebenzi wokuqashwa kwesikhashana owenziwa kanye kuphela.

agency.label: I-ejensi
agency.title: Umholi Wokulethwa Kwemisebenzi Kumakhasimende

challenge.title: Ukulethwa kwezinsizakalo kumakhasimende ngezinga elikhulu
challenge.description: Ukunqoba isethulo sephrojekthi (pitch) kuyingxenye nje yomsebenzi. Imisebenzi yamakhasimende ephindaphindekayo idinga ukwenziwa ngokushesha — kodwa ukudluliselana umsebenzi kanye nokuzama ukuphinda ukhiqize ividiyo kaningi usebenzisa amathuluzi ahlukene okudala nokuhlela, kwenza inqubo yonke ihambe kancane.

solution.title: Umkhiqizo + Imvume Yekhasimende
solution.description: Shintsha usuke esigabeni sokwethula imibono uye ekulethweni kwemisebenzi okuqhubekayo, usebenzisa izindlela zokulawula eziqinisekisa ukuphepha komkhiqizo, ukubuyekezwa kwamakhasimende ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa komsebenzi wokugcina, kanye nezindleko zamakhredithi ezibikezelekayo ngomsebenzi ngamunye.
features: Ukubona kuqala ngokushesha ngenhloso yezethulo kanye nokuthola imvume yekhasimende
Izifanekiso ezingasetshenziswa kabusha zamafomethi amakhasimende aphindaphindekayo
Ukubonakala kwesabelomali kuzo zonke izigaba zokuguqulwa
Ukulethwa kwezinsizakalo okwandisekayo ngaphandle kokwengeza abasebenzi

agency.win: Feza izinqubo zokwethula amaphrojekthi kanye nemisebenzi yamakhasimende ephindaphindekayo ngokushesha okukhulu, unciphise ubungozi bokukhiqiza futhi wandise inzuzo.

creator.label: Qala indiza yakho yokuhlola yokukhiqiza
creator.subtext: $9 kanye kuphela • Amakhredithi angu-750 • Ukufinyelela okugcwele enkundleni

team.label: Bhukha uhambo lokuhlola nethimba
team.subtext: Bona ukuthi amaqembu angaphakathi enkampanini ayithatha kanjani indawo yezinqubo zabahlinzeki bangaphandle.

productionShop.label: Hlola izifanekiso eziqondile
productionShop.subtext: Ezindlini nezakhiwo, ezemfundo, imibhalo, nokunye — bheka ukuthi yini ongayiguqula ibe umkhiqizo.

agency.label: Buka amanani ethimba
agency.subtext: Izinhlelo zezinkampani kanye nezindawo zokukhiqiza ezisebenza ngezinga elikhulu

categories.title: Izakhiwo, Izindawo kanye Nokwamukela Izivakashi
categories.qualifyingStatement: Yakhiwe kusetshenziswa izithombe zempahla yakho yangempela — yethulwa njengohambo oluqondiswa yizwi lakho kanye ne-avatar, olwenziwe ngobuchwepheshe be-AI. Inikeza umbono ongokoqobo wokwakheka nezici zendawo, kodwa ayithathi indawo yokuvakashela indawo mathupha. Lonke uhambo lunemibhalo ecacile echazayo.

examples.label: Izindlu Zokuhlala
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zendawo yakho kanye nesithombe somuntu wakho (avatar) kanye nezwi lakho osekuvele kugciniwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha ividiyo yobungcweti ebonisa indawo, equkethe isithombe nezwi lakho — ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Izakhiwo Zezohwebo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha amapulani esakhiwo, izithombe ezibonisa ukuthi sizobukeka kanjani, kanye nolwazi ngendawo, kanye nezwi elirekhodiwe nesithombe esimele umthengisi wakho (i-avatar). Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo abonisa indawo ukuze uhehe abatshalizimali — okwenza yonke ingxenye yendawo ibonakale sengathi ingokoqobo — futhi konke lokhu kutholakala ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Ukuqashisa kwesikhathi esifushane
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zendlu kanye nemininingwane ngezinsiza ezitholakalayo, kuhambisana nokuqoshwa kwezwi lomnikazi wendawo. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha amavidiyo edijithali okwamukela izivakashi, abingelela isivakashi ngasinye ngolimi lwaso — ngaphambi kokuba zifike zibhalise ukungena.

examples.label: Ezokwamukela Izivakashi Nezokuvakasha
examples.description: Cabanga nje ngokulayisha izithombe zehhotela kanye namaphuzu avelele ohambo, usebenzisa izwi lomamukeli kanye nesithombe esimele umuntu (avatar) okuyingxenye yohlobo lwakho lwebhizinisi. Bese uthumela ngokushesha izinkambo ezibonakalayo kanye nemihlahlandlela yohambo echazwa ngezwi ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 — konke lokhu ngaphandle kokudinga ithimba lokuthatha amavidiyo endaweni ngayinye.

examples.label: Abaqondisi Bemnyuziyamu Nemibukiso Yobuciko
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zemibukiso kanye namanothi omphathi wemibukiso njengoba imibukiso ishintsha. Bese uvuselela ngokushesha izinkambo eziqondiswayo ngezwi ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 — ngaphandle kokudinga ukuphinda uthathe izithombe lapho umbukiso ushintsha.

examples.label: Imfundo eyisisekelo (K-12) kanye nemfundo ephakeme
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izinto zokufunda ezihlanganisa izwi lomfundisi wakho elirekhodiwe kanye nesimo sakhe esibonakalayo. Bese udala ngokushesha izigaba eziphelele zezifundo abafundi bakho be-ESL kanye nabasemakampasini omhlaba wonke abangazibuka ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Ukufunda Nokuthuthukiswa Kwabasebenzi Ezinkampanini
examples.description: Cabanga nje ngokulayisha imibhalo ehlobene nemithetho nemigomo, usebenzisa izwi elirekhodiwe kanye nesithombe esimele umqeqeshi wakho (i-avatar). Bese uqalisa ngokushesha uhlelo olufanayo lokwamukela nokuqeqeshela abasebenzi ezindabeni zokuphepha kuwo wonke amahhovisi — konke lokhu kutholakala ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Izifundo ze-Software SaaS
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zesikrini (screenshots) ze-UI njengezithombe eziyisisekelo, kanye nokuqoshwa kwezwi lochwepheshe bomkhiqizo wakho. Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo achazayo abonisa ukusebenza kohlelo — okuhlala kubuyekezwa ngosuku olwethulwa ngalo i-UI yakho.

examples.label: Ukufundisa Amakhono Akhethekile
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe ezikhombisa izinyathelo kanye nokuqoshwa kwezwi lomqeqeshi wakho kanye nemininingwane yomlingiswa wakhe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha uchungechunge lwezifundo ezisezingeni eliphezulu — kungaba ezokupheka, ezokuzenzela izinto (DIY), noma ezokulungiselela izivivinyo zezitifiketi — ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Imfundo Yezokwelapha/Yeziguli
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imidwebo yezinqubo zokwelapha kanye nokuqoshwa kwezwi likachwepheshe wakho kwezokwelapha okugciniwe nokuvunyiwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha amavidiyo acacile okufundisa iziguli, imindeni engawaqonda ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Izinkumbulo Ezirekhodwe Ngevidiyo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zomndeni, okuqoshiwe kwengxoxo, kanye namanothi ngezigcawu kanye nezwi lomlandisi elivele lilondoloziwe. Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo ezinkumbulo ahlukaniswe ngezahluko — futhi uvumele uhlaka lwevidiyo (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokuba kukhiqizwe inguqulo yokugcina.

examples.label: Izindaba Zendawo Ethile
examples.description: Cabanga nje ngokulayisha izithombe kanye nezindaba zanamuhla usebenzisa izwi lomethuli wezindaba elirekhodiwe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha izindaba ezimfushane zansuku zonke zomphakathi — ngaphandle kwethimba lokuthatha amavidiyo noma ukwehluleka ukuhambisana nesikhathi esibekiwe.

examples.label: Izifinyezo Zezimali Nezemakethe
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imininingwane yemakethe nezithombe zamashadi njalo ekuseni kanye nezwi lomhlaziyi wakho elirekhodiwe. Bese ukuguqula lokho ngokushesha kube wumhlahlandlela obonakalayo ohambisana nencazelo yezwi — okuba sekulungele ngaphambi kokuba kuvulwe imakethe.

examples.label: Ukuhlaziywa kwezemidlalo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izibalo zomdlalo nezithombe kanye nezwi lomhlaziyi wakho elirekhodiwe. Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo afingqa umdlalo aqukethe izithombe ezinyakazayo — ashicilelwa ngesikhathi abalandeli besaxoxa ngawo.

examples.label: Amadokhumentari Obugebengu Bangempela Nawakudala
examples.description: Cabanga ngokugcina izithombe zabantu abavelele emlandweni ku-Reference Library yakho kanye kuphela. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha iziqephu eziningi lapho ubuso nezwi ngalinye kuhlala kungashintshi — ochungechungeni olulodwa ngemva kolunye.

examples.label: Izaziso Zesimo Sezulu Nezezimo Eziphuthumayo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imiyalezo ephuthumayo usebenzisa izwi elirekhodiwe nelithembekile lenhlangano yakho. Bese usakaza ngokushesha izixwayiso ezicacile ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 ezinkundleni zokuxhumana — konke lokhu kwenzeka ngemizuzu, hhayi ngezinsuku.

examples.label: Amavidiyo achaza ngemikhiqizo
examples.description: Cabanga ulayisha izithombe zemikhiqizo kanye nezwi lomethuli kanye nesithombe esimele umuntu (avatar) okugcinwe kohlobo lwakho lwebhizinisi. Bese udala ngokushesha uchungechunge lwamavidiyo achazayo asezingeni le-cinema — vuma uhlaka lwevidiyo (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokuba ukhiqize ividiyo yokugcina.

examples.label: Ucwaningo Lwesimo/Ubufakazi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zobuso bamakhasimende, izithombe zephrojekthi, kanye nemininingwane yempumelelo uhlanganise nalokho nezwi lomlandisi elivele lilondoloziwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha izethulo ezisezingeni eliphezulu ezibonisa impumelelo — ngaphandle kokudinga ukuqopha amakhasimende ekhuluma ngomsebenzi owenziwe.

examples.label: Ukuqasha kanye Nokwakha Isithunzi Somkhiqizo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zehhovisi kanye nezici ezibalulekile zesiko lenkampani, kanye nezwi elirekhodiwe nesithombe esimele umuntu (avatar) womqashi wakho. Bese unikeza abafuna umsebenzi ithuba lokubona ngokushesha ukuthi usuku olujwayelekile emsebenzini lunjani — konke lokhu kwenziwa ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 ukuze kuqashwe abantu emhlabeni jikelele.

examples.label: Ukukhushulwa Kwemihlangano Nemicimbi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imininingwane ngabakhulumeli, imininingwane yezikhathi zohlelo, kanye nezithombe zendawo yomcimbi, konke kuhambisana nezwi lomphathi womcimbi eliqoshiwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha izethulo zabakhulumeli kanye nemihlahlandlela echaza lokho okulindelekile — okubuyekezwa njalo uma uhlelo lushintsha.

examples.label: Imibiko Yemithelela Yezinhlangano Ezingekho Ngaphansi Kukahulumeni (NGOs)
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe ezithathwe enkundleni kanye nemininingwane ngomthelela womsebenzi, uhlanganise nalokho izwi lomuntu okhulumayo eliqoshiwe lenhlangano yakho. Bese uguqula ngokushesha imibiko yabanikeli ibe ngamavidiyo athinta inhliziyo futhi anezwi elichazayo — kuvele izwi elimele umgomo wakho, hhayi nje uchungechunge lwezithombe eziboniswayo.

examples.label: Izimemezelo Zezempilo Yomphakathi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imiyalezo yezempilo egunyaziwe usebenzisa izwi lomnyango wakho elithembekile nelirekhodiwe. Bese ufinyelela ngokushesha kuwo wonke umphakathi ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 — ngokucaca okufanayo, ngokuphuthuma okufanayo, nangaphandle kokubambezeleka ngenxa yokuhumusha.

examples.label: Izincazelo ngezindaba zomthetho nomshuwalense
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izifinyezo zezinkontileka nemidwebo yezinqubo kanye nezwi lomeluleki wakho elirekhodiwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha izincazelo ezibonakalayo amakhasimende azizwa eqonda ngempela — ngaphambi kokuba asayine noma afake isimangalo.

examples.label: Izimfundiso Zenkolo Nezingokomoya
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha amanothi ezintshumayelo noma imibhalo engcwele ehambisana nezwi kanye nokuba khona kukathisha wakho okuqoshiwe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha uchungechunge lwamavidiyo ansuku zonke oluqhubekayo lwamabandla emhlabeni jikelele — ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

institutionalRoi.title: Shintsha ukusebenzisa abahlinzeki bangaphandle ekuthathweni kwezithombe namavidiyo, ufake esikhundleni sako ukukhiqiza ngaphakathi enkampanini okuhlelekayo nokubikezelekayo.
institutionalRoi.subtitle: Amathimba ezokuxhumana, ezokuqeqesha nokuthuthukiswa kwabasebenzi (L&D), kanye nawokumaketha anamalungu angu-1 kuya kwangu-5 angakhiqiza futhi akhiphe amavidiyo phakathi neviki elifanayo, ngaphandle kokudinga izinkontileka zesikhathi eside nezinkampani zangaphandle noma izinqubo zokuhlela ezingenamkhawulo wesikhathi.

comparisons.label: Ukuthatha nokuhlela izithombe zomhlinzeki wemikhiqizo yendabuko

bullets: Izifanekiso ezihambisana nemigomo yomkhiqizo kanye nokugunyazwa ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kokugcina
Imikhawulo yesabelomali enemininingwane ebonakalayo yokusetshenziswa kwesikweletu ngaphansi kwephrojekthi ngayinye
Akukho zinsuku zokusebenza kwethimba, akukho ukuthumelana imiyalezo okuphindaphindayo mayelana nokulungiswa komsebenzi.

platformWalkthrough.title: Ukubuka Kafushane Inkundla
platformWalkthrough.subtitle: Umhlahlandlela ophelele wenqubo yokusebenza ye-SceneFlow AI Studio, kusukela ekubuyekezweni ngokubambisana kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina wefilimu.
platformWalkthrough.chapterHint: Izinto ezine okufanele uzazi namuhla. Vula izigaba uma ufuna ukuthola ulwazi oluphelele.

chapters.label: Qala lapha — lokho okuthola ngosuku lokuqala
Qinisekisa ukuthi umyalezo wakho ufinyelela kahle ezilalelini zakho.
Kusukela kumabhithi avunyiwe kuya kumculo oqediwe oshicilelwe
Amaqembu afuna izinhlelo zokukhokhisa kanye nokuphatha nokulawula

beatFirst.title: Inqubo Yokukhiqiza Ividiyo Eqala Ngesigqi
beatFirst.description: Vumela izigaba ze-pre-vis kanye ne-Beat Frames ngaphambi kwesigaba se-F2V — lokhu kunciphisa ukwenziwa kabusha okungahleliwe okubangelwa amaphutha ohlelo (njengokuziqambela izinto noma ukuphambuka embonweni wokuqala). Kuyindlela eyodwa ehlelekile kusukela ekubuyekezweni kuya esiqeshini sokugcina.
keyFeatures: Express Pre-vis ukuze kubuyekezwe — yabelana ngama-beat ngaphambi kokwenza i-render enzima
Beat Frames ukwakheka kokukhiya — Reference Library ukuqhubeka
I-F2V ngesigqi ngasinye — dala ividiyo kusuka kuzinhlaka ezivunyiwe
Isikhathi nemifudlana ye-mixer — ukuthumela ku-assembly ye-Final Cut
beatFirst.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Beat Frames kanye nokuvunywa kohlaka lwevidiyo (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokwenziwa kwevidiyo.
beatFirst.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: Ukuvuma imiculo, ukukhiya amafreyimu, bese kukhiqizwa iziqeshana ze-F2V.

screeningRoom.title: Ukubuyekezwa kanye Nokuhlaziywa Kwabalaleli
screeningRoom.description: Izixhumanisi zokwabelana eziyimfihlo zababambiqhaza — okuhlanganisa amaphuzu afakwe ngesandla, impendulo ehleliwe, kanye nemininingwane yokuzibandakanya engakhethwa (ngemvume yombukeli). Kusetshenziswa ku-Premiere ngaphambi kokushicilelwa kanye nokubuka kuqala i-pre-vis yokukhiqiza (production).
keyFeatures: Izikhathi zokubuyekeza eziyimfihlo — izixhumanisi zokwabelana eziphephile zababambiqhaza
Impendulo ehleliwe evela ezilalelini — izilinganiso kanye nezinto ezivulekile
Izibalo zokusebenzisana ozikhethela zona — ngemvume yombukeli ngaphambi kokuqoqwa kwemininingwane
Thuthukisa ngokusekelwe kudatha yangempela — lungisa i-Blueprint kanye nombhalo ngokusebenzisa imibono yabahloli.
screeningRoom.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Iphaneli yokuhlaziya kanye nempendulo yomhloli ye-Screening Room
screeningRoom.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engu-30: Ukubamba umhlangano wokubuyekeza kanye nokuqoqa imininingwane mayelana nokubamba iqhaza

items.title: Isipiliyoni somsebenzisi esinembile + Ukulawula okuphelele komdali
items.description: Qala ngokushesha usebenzisa uhlelo oluzenzakalelayo oluqondiswayo, bese uhlela yonke imiphumela ekhiqiziwe ukuze amaqembu agcine ukulawula ngasohlangothini lokudala ngaphandle kokulahlekelwa yisivinini.
keyFeatures: Inqubo yokusebenza eqondiswayo ye-Studio — kusukela emcabangweni kuya ekukhipheni umsebenzi, konke endaweni eyodwa.
Lungisa isigqi, umlingiswa, kanye nomugqa ngamunye okhiqizwe yi-AI khona kanye lapho ukhona.
Izinhlobo ezahlukene zendlela yokwenza — ukuqhathanisa eceleni ukuze kutholakale isiqondiso sobuciko
Blueprint Sebenzisanani — yabelanani ngezixhumanisi, umsindo wezigaba, kanye nemibono ehlelekile evela kubahloli
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Umhleli we-Blueprint onezigaba ezikhiqiziwe ezingahleleka
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engu-30: Ukuhamba kwenqubo ye-UX kusukela emcabangweni kuya emkhiqizweni ongahle uhlelwe.

items.title: Isabelomali Sesikweletu Nokulawulwa Kwezindleko
items.description: Landelela ukusetshenziswa kwamakhredithi ngesikhathi sangempela futhi ubeke imingcele ngaphambi kokuba kuqale izinqubo ezibizayo zokukhiqiza.
keyFeatures: Ukusetshenziswa kwekhredithi ngesikhathi sangempela — ngokwephrojekthi nangokomsebenzi
Izinyathelo zokuvikela ohlelweni olusebenzayo — ngaphambi kokuqala imisebenzi yokukhiqiza ebiza kakhulu
Uhlu lwamanani olucacile — lwe-TTS, ividiyo, kanye nobuchwepheshe obuhlakaniphile
Ukubonakala kwesabelomali — kwamaqembu nakubadali abazimele
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: iphaneli yokusetshenziswa kwekhredithi nezilungiselelo ze-BYOK
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: ideshibhodi yesabelomali nokulungiselelwa okubalulekile

underTheHood.title: Ngaphansi kwe-bonnet
underTheHood.body: Kumathimba okukhiqiza anezinkontileka ze-cloud ezikhona kakade:
bullets: Vertex AI BYOK — ukukhokhisa nokuphatha kwebhizinisi
Uhlu lwamanani olucacile lwenkundla eduze nezinkinobho zakho

items.title: Noma yimuphi umqondo, inqubo eyodwa yokukhiqiza
items.description: Sebenzisa uhlelo olulodwa oluthembekile lokuqeqesha, ama-podcast, izindaba, amavidiyo okudayiswa kwezindlu, kanye nokuqukethwe okusezingeni lefilimu.
keyFeatures: Umzila owodwa — ama-podcast, izindaba, ukuqeqeshwa, ezindlu nomhlaba, kanye nezinhlobo zokuqukethwe okufana nokwefilimu
Izifanekiso zephrojekthi — I-Studio ivumelana nezinto zakho zokuqala
Indlela efanayo ye-Blueprint → Umbhalo → Inqubo yokukhiqiza — kungakhathaliseki uhlobo
Akukho kushintshwa kwamathuluzi — kusukela ekwakhiweni komqondo kuya ekulethweni komsebenzi.
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Ukubuka okuhlukanisiwe noma igridi ebonisa izifanekiso ze-Podcast, Izindaba, Ezokuthengiswa Kwezindlu Nomhlaba (Real Estate), kanye neze-Cinematic, zonke zingena esibonakalisi somsebenzisi (UI) esisodwa esihlangene senqubo yokusebenza ye-SceneFlow.
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: "Qala nganoma yiziphi izinto zokuqala..." ngokuchofoza okuthi New Project -> Podcast (isibonisi sishintshela ekusebenzeni nomsindo), bese ukhombisa isikrini esihlukanisiwe lapho amaphrojekthi wezindaba (News) nawamafilimu (Cinematic) ehlangana khona kuhlelo lokuhlela lwe-Blueprint.

items.title: Ukuzenzakalela okuhlakaniphile okunokulawulwa kokuhlela okunembile
items.description: Inkundla ye-SceneFlow isebenzisa ubuhlakani ukukhiqiza ngokuzenzakalelayo isisekelo esisezingeni lochwepheshe (uchungechunge, uhlaka, umbhalo, imiyalelo yokukhiqiza, kanye nezinguquko), kuyilapho ihlinzeka ngezingxoxo ezihlakaniphile ezinikeza amandla aphelele okuhlela kanye nezindlela zokuvikela ezakhelwe ngaphakathi.
keyFeatures: Izisekelo ze-AI ngesinyathelo esisodwa — uchungechunge, uhlaka, umbhalo, kanye nemiyalelo yokukhiqiza
Amabhokisi okuhlela ahlakaniphile — izindlela zokuqondisa, hhayi ukubhala kabusha ngaphandle kokucabangela
Yamukela, lungisa, noma wenqaba — yonke imibono ihlala ngaphansi kokulawulwa kwakho.
Ukubandakanyeka kwabantu — kuzo zonke izigaba zokukhiqiza

items.question: Inqubo yokusebenza ye-SceneFlow iqhubeka kanjani kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo esilungele ukushicilelwa?
items.answer: I-SceneFlow isebenzisa inqubo yokusebenza ehleliwe: Uchungechunge (ongakukhetha) → Blueprint → Ukukhiqiza → Final Cut → Premiere. I-Blueprint ichaza ukwakheka kwendaba kanye nezithameli ezihlosiwe ngokusebenzisa i-Audience Resonance. Isigaba sokukhiqiza sikhiqiza umbhalo, i-pre-vis, ividiyo eyisisekelo (beat video), kanye nezingxenye zesigcawu ezicutshunguliwe (rendered scene streams). I-Final Cut ihlanganisa izingxenye ezikhethiwe zibe ifayela elilodwa elikhulu le-MP4 — akuyona ithuluzi lokuhlela ngokulandelana kwesikhathi (timeline editor). I-Premiere iphatha imibukiso, imininingwane ehlaziyiwe, ukushicilelwa ku-YouTube, kanye namaphakethe okukhipha umsebenzi.

items.question: Ihluke kanjani i-SceneFlow kwi-Gemini Studio noma kwi-Google Flow?
items.answer: I-Gemini Studio ne-Google Flow zigxile ekukhiqizeni amavidiyo ngokusekelwe emiyaletweni (prompt-and-generate). I-SceneFlow ihlanganisa yonke inqubo yokukhiqiza: izigaba ezihleliwe ezinezisekelo ezingaguqulwa, i-Reference Library ne-Beat Frames zokuqinisekisa ukuhambisana kwekhwalithi, i-Audience Resonance ngaphambi kwenqubo ebiza kakhulu yokugcina ividiyo (rendering), ukuhlanganiswa okuzenzakalelayo kwezwi nesithombe (Mixer and stream assembly), kanye nokuqinisekiswa kwe-Screening Room ngaphambi kokushicilela — konke lokhu kwenziwa endaweni eyodwa eqondiswayo. Izindleko zokusebenzisa imodeli ziyafana kungakhathaliseki ukuthi usebenzisa i-SceneFlow, ama-akhawunti akho omhlinzeki, noma i-BYOK — kodwa i-SceneFlow yonga amahora amaningi okukopisha nokunamathisela, ukuphinda ukhiqize, nokuhlanganisa ividiyo ngesandla.

items.question: Ingabe ngingakwazi ukuhlela imibhalo, izithombe, nomsindo okukhiqizwe yi-AI?
items.answer: Yebo. Konke okuveziwe kungahlehliswa noma kushintshwe. Ungabhala kabusha imibhalo, ulungise indlela izigcawu eziqhutshwa ngayo, wakhe kabusha izingxenye ezithile, ulungise umsindo wokuphawula (voiceover), futhi uhlele kahle isikhathi ku-Production Mixer. I-Final Cut ihlanganisa kuphela izingxenye eziqediwe — izinguquko zobuciko zenziwa esigabeni sokukhiqiza (Production).

items.question: Isebenza kanjani i-Target Audience Resonance manje?
items.answer: I-Audience Resonance ihlanganisa ukuhlaziywa kwesakhiwo sendaba (ukucaca, isivinini sokuhamba kwendaba, nokushintshashintsha kwemizwa) nokuhambisana nohlobo lwezethameli ozichaze ku-Blueprint — hhayi idatha yokugcinwa kwezethameli ngemuva kokushicilelwa. Uthola izincomo ezithinta izingxenye ezithile kanye nezixazululo ezenziwa ngokuchofoza kanye nje, okuhlanganisa izinga lochungechunge, i-Blueprint, kanye nokubuyekezwa kombhalo ngaphambi kwenqubo enzima yokukhiqiza umkhiqizo wokugcina (rendering).

items.question: Ingabe ngingakwazi ukukhiqiza amavidiyo okukhangisa noma okwethula izinto ngezilimi eziningi?
items.answer: Yebo. Ungakwazi ukukhiqiza nokulungisa amavidiyo ukuze afanele izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70, usebenzisa izinqubo zomsebenzi ezihlelelwe isikhathi esiqondile. Ngokuvamile, amaqembu aqala ngokwenza inguqulo eyinhloko yevidiyo, bese ekhiqiza ezinye izinhlobo zayo ngezilimi ezahlukene ukuze zihlangabezane nezidingo zabathengi bomhlaba wonke, amakhasimende, noma izethameli zezifunda ezithile.

items.question: Yini eyenziwa yi-Premiere uma i-Screening Room kuyisigaba sokubuyekeza?
items.answer: I-Screening Room yindawo yokubuyekeza engaphakathi kwe-Premiere — futhi isetshenziselwa ukubuka kuqala i-pre-vis yokukhiqiza (production). Yabelana ngezixhumanisi ze-/s/, qoqa imibono yabathintekayo kanye nemininingwane yokusebenzisana (ngemvume yombukeli), buyekeza amaphuzu kanye nemininingwane ebonakalayo, bese ushicilela usebenzisa ithuluzi le-YouTube noma ukhiphe amaqoqo (bundles).

items.question: Ingabe ngiyayidinga i-experience yezobuchwepheshe noma yokuhlela?
items.answer: Cha. I-SceneFlow yakhelwe abadali namaqembu angenalo ulwazi olujulile lwezobuchwepheshe. Uqala ngezindlela eziqondiswayo zokufaka ulwazi kanye nezisekelo ze-AI ezingaguqulwa esigabeni ngasinye — hhayi inqubo eyinkimbinkimbi yokwakha imiyalelo (prompt engineering) noma ukusebenzisa amathuluzi amaningi ahlukene.

items.question: Uhlelo lwe-Explorer lusebenza kanjani?
items.answer: Ngama-dollar ayi-9, uthola ama-credit ayi-750 ukuze uhlole inqubo yokusebenza ephelele ngokuthenga kanye kuphela. Lokhu kuhlelelwe ukuba kube yindlela yokuzama okusebenzayo, ukuze ukwazi ukwenza imisebenzi yangempela yokuguqula umqondo ube yividiyo ngaphambi kokukhetha uhlelo lokukhokha njalo ngenyanga.

items.question: Kuphathwa kanjani amakhredithi kanye ne-BYOK?
items.answer: Amakhredithi alandelelwa ngaphakathi kwenkundla ukuze amaqembu akwazi ukuphatha ibhajethi ngokwezigaba zokuhamba komsebenzi. Izinhlelo ze-Pro ne-Studio ziphinde zisekele isici esithi "Bring Your Own Key" (BYOK) kubahlinzeki abasekelwayo, okuhlinzeka ngokulawulwa okwengeziwe kwezindleko ezinhlanganweni ezinezinkontileka ezikhona nabahlinzeki.

items.question: Yini engingayidala ngempela ngisebenzisa i-SceneFlow?
items.answer: Amaqembu asebenzisa i-SceneFlow ukuze enze imibukiso yezindlu nezakhiwo, okuqukethwe kwezemfundo, ama-podcast afaka ukulandisa okubonakalayo, izinhlelo ezichaza izindaba, imikhankaso yomkhiqizo, kanye nochungechunge lweziqephu eziklanywe ngendlela yamafilimu. Le nqubo yokusebenza iyona efanayo esekela ukukhiqizwa kokuqukethwe okufushane kanye nokude.

finalCta.title: Usukulungele ukuhlola uhlelo lokusebenza oluphelele?
finalCta.subtitle: Qala ngomqondo → i-pre-vis → ividiyo → ifayela le-MP4 lokugcina, konke endaweni eyodwa yokukhiqiza. Qala ngephakheji engu-$9 Explorer ukuze ubone indlela yokusebenza ebeka umculo (i-beat) phambili.

footer.description: Ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo okuzenzakalelayo kusukela ekuqaleni kuze kube sekugcineni — kusukela emcabangweni kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osekulungele ukushicilelwa. Isitudiyo esisodwa esiqondiswayo: Blueprint → Ukukhiqiza → Final Cut → Premiere.
footer.securePayments: Izinkokhelo eziphephile ezicutshungulwa yi-Whop, okuyiyo inhlangano yethu ebhekelele ukucutshungulwa kwezinkokhelo.

preVisEngine.title: Pre-Visualization Engine
preVisEngine.subtitle: Generating a fully voiced, scored, 40-minute audio-visual animatic in 15 minutes is not a workflow step — that is the product. In Hollywood, pre-vis takes weeks and costs hundreds of thousands of dollars. SceneFlow scales it to minutes and pocket change.
preVisEngine.narrative: In the film industry, a pre-vis is something you hand to a crew. Pre-vis is what you show studio executives, investors, and producers to get a project greenlit. SceneFlow elevates production from consumer creator tool to enterprise-grade pipeline asset.

pillars.title: The Ultimate Pitch Deck
pillars.description: Upload a script and walk into a pitch meeting with a fully voiced, scored, multi-language pre-vis plus hard data from Audience Resonance. Give creators a data-backed, audio-visual cheat code to get their movies made.

pillars.title: Fail-Fast Pre-Production
pillars.description: Traditional pre-vis requires 3D animators, pre-vis artists, and voice actors for weeks. If a scene does not work, tens of thousands of dollars are wasted. Iterate in 15 minutes before a single camera crew member is hired.

pillars.title: Financier Analytics
pillars.description: Audience Resonance at upload appeals to the most risk-averse part of the industry: financiers. Show how pacing, tone, and dialogue align with target demographics before a single dollar is spent on production.

workflow.title: Script upload → greenlight-ready pre-vis
steps: Run Audience Resonance scoring on your target demographic
Generate Express Pre-vis — voiced, scored animatics in minutes
Share for stakeholder review before final video spend
